queries.question: Show every single jet bridge and just the staircars assigned to terminal 1.
queries.sql:
SELECT Jet_Bridges.BridgeName as Name
FROM Jet_Bridges JOIN Terminals ON Jet_Bridges.TerminalID = Terminals.ID
UNION
SELECT Staircars.CarName as Name
FROM Staircars JOIN Terminals ON Staircars.TerminalID = Terminals.ID
WHERE Terminals.name = "Terminal 1"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?jet_bridges a :Jet_Bridges .
    ?terminals a :Terminals .
    ?jet_bridges p:hasTerminals ?terminals .
    ?jet_bridges p:BridgeName ?bridgename .
    BIND(?bridgename AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?staircars a :Staircars .
    ?terminals a :Terminals .
    ?staircars p:hasTerminals ?terminals .
    ?staircars p:CarName ?carname .
    ?terminals p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Terminal 1")
    BIND(?carname AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Give me all jet bridges and staircars assigned to terminal 1.
queries.sql:
SELECT Jet_Bridges.BridgeName as Name
FROM Jet_Bridges JOIN Terminals ON Jet_Bridges.TerminalID = Terminals.ID
WHERE Terminals.name = "Terminal 1"
UNION
SELECT Staircars.CarName as Name
FROM Staircars JOIN Terminals ON Staircars.TerminalID = Terminals.ID
WHERE Terminals.name = "Terminal 1"
